title: Character Vulnerabilities
description: NPCs have vulnerabilities: sick relatives, debts, vices, etc. These vulnerabilities can be exploited for leverage. Discovery of vulnerabilities comes through espionage and investigation.
definition-of-done: NPCs generated with vulnerabilities. Vulnerabilities discoverable through investigation. Different vulnerability types with different leverage. Vulnerability info stored in intel.
testing-plan: Verify NPCs have vulnerabilities. Test discovery mechanics. Verify different types work. Test intel storage.
